nodes.name: Golden-crowned tanager
nodes.summary: The golden-crowned tanager (Iridosornis rufivertex) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The golden-crowned tanager (Iridosornis rufivertex) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Colombia, Ecuador, Peru,…

nodes.summary: Golden-crowned tanager（Iridosornis rufivertex）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Golden-crowned tanager。

nodes.name: Iridosornis
nodes.summary: Iridosornis（Iridosornis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Purplish-mantled tanager、Yellow-throated tanager、Golden-crowned tanager等4种鸟类。
